title: erodium cygnorum
intro: Erodium cygnorum, also known as the Swan's-foot or Corn Marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The medicinal properties of Erodium cygnorum include its ability to exhibit antibacterial and antifungal activities, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of this plant include its use in treating various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential anti-cancer and antioxidant effects. Erodium cygnorum is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and is also used in traditional medicine practices in various parts of the world.
